law_comparisons.law_title: サイバー通信情報監理委員会事務局組織令

am_amendment_snapshot_pair_analysis.finding: raw_snapshot_json, eligibility_hash, and summary_hash are unchanged for all 7,298 pairs; observed typed-field differences are projection/nullability differences, not source amendments.

false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.symptom: raw_snapshot_json and hashes are identical, but typed columns move value_to_null in version 2.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.evidence: 7,298/7,298 paired rows have raw_snapshot_json unchanged; 6,276 entities have at least one typed field changed.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.mitigation: Do not emit amendment diff when raw_snapshot_sha256 and normalized_business_sha256 are unchanged and all typed diffs are projection-only value_to_null. Emit collector_regression_candidate instead.

false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.symptom: target_set_json is [] in version 1 and NULL in version 2.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.evidence: 6,155 target_set_json changes are all value_to_null from the empty array string.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.mitigation: Normalize NULL, empty string, and [] to an empty target set before diffing; keep raw nullability in projection audit only.

false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.symptom: budget_yen, application_fee_yen, exam_fee_yen, capital_max_yen, or tiny/negative values are projected into amount_max_yen, then disappear.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.evidence: amount changes are 629 value_to_null; source keys include amount_max_man_yen 193, budget_yen 96, application_fee_yen 59, and many non-subsidy keys.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.mitigation: Store amount_kind with values such as grant_cap, budget, fee, capital_limit, loan_limit; only grant_cap/loan_limit should drive high-severity program amount diffs.

false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.symptom: pass_rate, interest_rate, selectivity_rate, or reduction_rate are projected as subsidy_rate_max.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.evidence: rate changes are 76 value_to_null; exact raw-key matches include reduction_rate 13, interest_rate_base_annual 11, selectivity_rate 7, pass_rate_latest 6.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.mitigation: Store rate_kind and compare only rate_kind=subsidy_rate for eligibility/subsidy severity; loan interest and pass/selectivity rates get separate fields.

false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.symptom: source_url column becomes NULL while raw JSON still carries source_primary, url, url_primary, portal_url, or law_url.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.evidence: source_url changes are 721 value_to_null; previous values match source_primary 434, url 190, url_primary 97.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.mitigation: Canonical source URL extractor must search ordered aliases and write source_url_extraction_key; URL disappearance with stable raw hash is collector regression, not source removal.

false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.symptom: footer, contact address, SNS link, organization banner, or access guide changes only.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.mitigation: Zone-strip footer/contact/nav before normalized_business_sha256; preserve contact hash as low-signal auxiliary field.

false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.symptom: generated_at, page updated label without business date, access counter, cache token, or analytics parameter changes.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.mitigation: Drop known timestamp/counter lines and tracking query parameters; compare only whitelisted business dates such as application start/end and law amendment dates.

false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.symptom: FAQ, notices, or attachments are reordered with no item body change.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.mitigation: Hash stable section items by heading+body; suppress pure ordering diffs and emit add/remove/changed item diffs only.

false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.symptom: PDF text extraction changes page numbers, headers, footers, or line breaks only.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.mitigation: Drop page-number-only lines and repeated header/footer bands before source_text_sha256 and difflib.

false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.symptom: eligibility_hash and summary_hash stay unchanged even when amount/target/source_url typed fields change.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.evidence: Current pairs show 0 hash changes with 7,581 field-level typed differences across amount/rate/target/source_url.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.mitigation: Add field_fingerprints_json and normalized_business_sha256 that include canonical typed fields; diff typed fields independently from summary/eligibility text hashes.

false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.symptom: A real fee, budget, loan, or interest-rate change is suppressed because it was stored under the wrong generic amount/rate column or normalized away.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.mitigation: Typed fields need field_kind, unit, source_key, and confidence_rule; compare within kind-specific fields rather than one generic amount/rate slot.

false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.symptom: The canonical URL field is NULL but raw JSON has a source alias, so source health/status diffs are skipped.
false_positive_false_negative_taxonomy.mitigation: Canonicalize source URL aliases before status checks; persist source_url_extraction_key and canonical_source_url so missing canonical URL is visible as extractor failure.

schema_design_one_commit.goal: Additive schema that lets an implementer ship source snapshots, typed-field fingerprints, and projection-regression detection in one commit without changing production behavior first.

tables.name: am_source_snapshot
tables.purpose: One row per entity/source fetch or DB-derived baseline snapshot.

tables.name: am_source_snapshot_field_diff
tables.purpose: Field-level diff rows that separate business changes, source-health changes, noise-only changes, and projection regressions.

tables.name: am_amendment_projection_audit
tables.purpose: Read-only audit companion for existing am_amendment_snapshot pairs; catches stable-raw/projection-null regressions before webhook/user-facing diffs.

critical: eligibility target set added/removed non-empty target
source_status changed live->broken after prior live

one_commit_acceptance_checks: Backfill one baseline run from current DB without external fetch.
Run pair audit on existing 7,298 am_amendment_snapshot pairs and classify current 6,276 affected entities as projection_regression_candidate, not business amendment.
Diff query can return no_change / typed_field_changed / source_status_changed for Tier S baseline rows.
Unit tests cover NULL vs [] target equivalence, source_url alias extraction, amount_kind separation, and stable raw hash with projection loss.

blockers: No external refetch was performed in r2, so source-byte content changes after the previous local DB snapshot are out of scope.
am_amendment_diff still has 0 rows; user-facing amendment notifications should remain gated until real non-projection diffs exist.
program_law_refs has 0 rows, so law changes cannot yet be propagated to impacted programs locally.
The existing am_amendment_snapshot hashes do not cover typed field fingerprints; hash-only comparison has a structural false-negative risk.
suggested_next_queries: with pair as (select p.entity_id, p.raw_snapshot_json p_raw, n.raw_snapshot_json n_raw, p.amount_max_yen p_amt, n.amount_max_yen n_amt from am_amendment_snapshot p join am_amendment_snapshot n on n.entity_id=p.entity_id and n.version_seq=2 where p.version_seq=1) select count(*) from pair where p_raw=n_raw and p_amt is not n_amt;
select version_seq, count(*), sum(amount_max_yen is not null), sum(target_set_json is not null), sum(source_url is not null) from am_amendment_snapshot group by version_seq;

select unified_id, primary_name, source_url, source_last_check_status, source_url_status, source_fail_count from programs where tier='S' and excluded=0 and source_url_status<>'live' order by source_last_check_status, primary_name;
select unified_id, primary_name, amount_max_man_yen, subsidy_rate, application_window_json, source_url_status from programs where tier='S' and excluded=0 order by primary_name limit 114;
select unified_id, law_title, last_amended_date, revision_status, source_checksum from laws order by last_amended_date desc limit 20;
